items.title_en: New York passes Mamdani's pied-a-terre tax. Here's who pays and how much
items.title_zh: 纽约通过了马姆达尼的临时住所税。这是谁付费以及多少钱
items.desc_en: Citadel CEO Ken Griffin became the face of the tax after New York City Mayor Zohran Mamdani posted a video in front of Griffin's penthouse apartment.
items.desc_zh: 纽约市市长 Zohran Mamdani 在 Griffin 的顶层公寓前发布了一段视频后，Citadel 首席执行官 Ken Griffin 成为了税收的代言人。

items.title_en: Waymo opens Ojai robotaxis to select riders as company aims to lower cost of fleet expansion
items.title_zh: Waymo 开设 Ojai 机器人出租车来挑选乘客，因为该公司旨在降低车队扩张成本
items.desc_en: Alphabet's Waymo is adding new vehicles to its fleet of public robotaxis and is opening up its roomier Ojai vehicles to some riders.
items.desc_zh: Alphabet 旗下的 Waymo 正在为其公共机器人出租车车队增加新车，并向一些乘客开放其更宽敞的 Ojai 车辆。

items.title_en: Unusual Machines and other drone stocks surge on report Pentagon considering stakes in the industry
items.title_zh: 五角大楼考虑入股该行业的报告导致异常机器和其他无人机股票飙升
items.desc_en: The Pentagon deals would aim to ramp up domestic production and lower the costs of drones, weapons that are viewed as critical in modern warfare.
items.desc_zh: 五角大楼的交易旨在提高国内产量并降低无人机的成本，无人机是现代战争中至关重要的武器。

items.title_en: Airlines, hotels warn against Trump admin threat to international flights to 'sanctuary cities'
items.title_zh: 航空公司、酒店警告特朗普政府不要威胁飞往“庇护城市”的国际航班
items.desc_en: Homeland Security Secretary Markwayne Mullin said the Trump administration is considering pulling international flight processing in "sanctuary cities."
items.desc_zh: 国土安全部部长马克韦恩·穆林表示，特朗普政府正在考虑取消“庇护城市”的国际航班处理。

items.title_en: Villas, cars and cash: Italy seizes dead Mafia mobster's millions
items.title_zh: 别墅、汽车和现金：意大利没收了死去的黑手党黑帮的数百万美元
items.desc_en: Police say the operation targeted the network of notorious late Sicilian mafia boss Matteo Messina Denaro.
items.desc_zh: 警方表示，这次行动的目标是臭名昭著的已故西西里黑手党老大马泰奥·梅西纳·德纳罗的网络。

items.title_en: Are US and Iran close to peace or sliding back to war?
items.title_zh: 美国和伊朗是接近和平还是滑向战争？
items.desc_en: Neither side seems interested in a return to all-out conflict, despite the latest exchange of strikes.
items.desc_zh: 尽管最近发生了相互攻击，但双方似乎都没有兴趣恢复全面冲突。

items.title_en: Starbucks says afternoon traffic is rising as turnaround starts to take hold
items.title_zh: 星巴克表示，随着扭亏为盈，下午客流量正在上升
items.desc_en: Starbucks says afternoon traffic is surging, led by menu innovation, as CEO Brian Niccol pushes to turn the chain into an all-day destination.
items.desc_zh: 星巴克表示，在菜单创新的带动下，下午的客流量激增，首席执行官布赖恩·尼科尔(Brian Niccol)努力将连锁店转变为全天营业的目的地。

items.title_en: U.S. sanctions Iran's Hormuz Strait authority, condemns ballistic missile launch at Kuwait
items.title_zh: 美国制裁伊朗霍尔木兹海峡当局，谴责在科威特发射弹道导弹
items.desc_en: The latest military and economic actions come as President Trump insists he feels no pressure to make a deal with Iran before November's midterm elections.
items.desc_zh: 最新的军事和经济行动发生之际，特朗普总统坚称他没有感受到在 11 月中期选举前与伊朗达成协议的压力。

items.title_en: Scoop: U.S. and Iran reach deal but need Trump's final approval, officials say - Axios
items.title_zh: 独家新闻：官员称，美国和伊朗已达成协议，但需要特朗普的最终批准 - Axios
items.desc_en: Scoop: U.S. and Iran reach deal but need Trump's final approval, officials say  AxiosOil prices fall more than 5% after Rubio says U.S. will give Iran talks 'every chance to succeed'  CNBCDeal or no d
items.desc_zh: 独家新闻：官员称，美国和伊朗达成协议，但需要特朗普的最终批准，在卢比奥表示美国将给予伊朗谈判“一切成功机会”后，AxiosOil 价格下跌超过 5%

items.title_en: Snowflake surges 35% toward best day ever on AI frenzy, fueling software rally
items.title_zh: Snowflake 股价飙升 35%，迎来 AI 狂潮有史以来最好的一天，推动软件反弹
items.desc_en: The Snowflake rally also lifted shares of ServiceNow, Oracle and Palantir, while Salesforce bucked the trend.
items.desc_zh: Snowflake 的上涨也提振了 ServiceNow、Oracle 和 Palantir 的股价，而 Salesforce 却逆势上涨。

items.title_en: This biotech is leading what could be a 'GLP-1 moment for hair loss,' says BTIG
items.title_zh: BTIG 表示，这种生物技术正在引领“脱发的 GLP-1 时刻”
items.desc_en: BTIG initiated research coverage with a buy rating, calling the biotech's experimental hair loss treatment a possible 'GLP-1 moment.'
items.desc_zh: BTIG 以买入评级启动研究报道，称该生物技术公司的实验性脱发治疗可能是“GLP-1 时刻”。

items.title_en: Gaming association says states have lost $1 billion in tax revenue due to prediction markets
items.title_zh: 博彩协会称各州因预测市场损失了 10 亿美元的税收
items.desc_en: Bill Miller, American Gaming Association president and CEO, added that prediction market platforms in his view amount to "backdoor sports betting."
items.desc_zh: 美国博彩协会主席兼首席执行官比尔·米勒补充说，他认为预测市场平台相当于“后门体育博彩”。

items.title_en: Israel hits Lebanese capital in 'targeted strike'
items.title_zh: 以色列对黎巴嫩首都进行“定点打击”
items.desc_en: Beirut had until now largely been spared even as both Israel and Hezbollah accused each other of breaking last month's ceasefire.
items.desc_zh: 尽管以色列和真主党都互相指责对方违反了上个月的停火协议，但贝鲁特迄今为止基本上没有受到影响。

items.title_en: Core inflation hit an annual rate of 3.3% in April, as expected, Fed’s preferred gauge shows
items.title_zh: 美联储首选指标显示，4月份核心通胀年率达到3.3%，符合预期
items.desc_en: The PCE price index for April was expected to show an annual inflation rate of 3.8% for all items and 3.3% for core.
items.desc_zh: 4 月份 PCE 价格指数预计显示所有项目年通胀率为 3.8%，核心通胀率为 3.3%。

items.title_zh: 乌克兰无人机部队在地面瞄准俄罗斯战场后方 - 路透中文网

items.title_zh: 第一件事：特朗普威胁称，如果美国盟友阿曼在霍尔木兹海峡问题上不“表现好”，他将“炸毁”它 - 英国《卫报》
items.desc_en: First Thing: Trump threatens to ‘blow up’ US ally Oman if it does not ‘behave’ over strait of Hormuz  The GuardianTrump’s ‘blow ‘em up’ threat to Oman means he’s now attacked or threatened 1 out of ev

items.title_en: EU fines Temu €200m for allowing sale of illegal products
items.title_zh: Temu因允许销售非法产品而被欧盟罚款2亿欧元
items.desc_en: The European Commission says the Chinese-owned online retailer failed to take account of risks from baby toys and faulty chargers sold on its platform.
items.desc_zh: 欧盟委员会表示，这家中国在线零售商未能考虑到其平台上销售的婴儿玩具和有缺陷充电器的风险。

items.title_en: Trump Accounts app launches — here's how to get started
items.title_zh: 特朗普账户应用程序启动——以下是如何开始
items.desc_en: Families can now download a Trump Accounts app to track the new investment accounts, which offer a $1,000 pilot program contribution for eligible children.
items.desc_zh: 家庭现在可以下载 Trump Accounts 应用程序来跟踪新的投资账户，该账户为符合条件的儿童提供 1,000 美元的试点计划捐款。

items.title_en: A federal judge in D.C. declines to block Trump's executive order on voting by mail - NPR
items.title_zh: 华盛顿特区的一名联邦法官拒绝阻止特朗普关于邮寄投票的行政命令 - NPR
items.desc_en: A federal judge in D.C. declines to block Trump's executive order on voting by mail  NPRFederal judge refuses to block Trump order to create federal voter list and limit mail voting  AP NewsDemocrats
items.desc_zh: 华盛顿特区的一名联邦法官拒绝阻止特朗普关于邮寄投票的行政命令 NPRF 联邦法官拒绝阻止特朗普创建联邦选民名单和限制邮寄投票的命令 美联社新闻民主党

items.title_en: Best Buy beats on top and bottom lines as retailer aims to reinvigorate sales
items.title_zh: 百思买的目标是重振销售，其营收和利润均表现出色
items.desc_en: Best Buy reported better-than-expected earnings on Thursday as the company works toward turning around its sales slump.
items.desc_zh: 百思买周四公布的盈利好于预期，该公司正努力扭转销售下滑的局面。

items.title_en: More workers are raiding their 401(k)s as average balances fall, Fidelity says
items.title_zh: 富达表示，随着平均余额下降，越来越多的工人正在抢夺他们的 401(k) 福利
items.desc_en: Retirement account balances sank at the start of 2026 amid market swings, according to Fidelity. At the same time, more savers tapped their accounts for cash.
items.desc_zh: 富达 (Fidelity) 表示，由于市场波动，退休账户余额在 2026 年初下降。与此同时，更多储户动用账户提取现金。

items.title_en: Man arrested after three injured in stabbing at Swiss train station
items.title_zh: 瑞士火车站刺伤三人受伤男子被捕
items.desc_en: The suspect, a 31-year-old Swiss man, has been arrested, police say, as areas around the station are cordoned off.
items.desc_zh: 警方称，由于车站周围地区已被封锁，嫌疑人是一名 31 岁的瑞士男子，他已被逮捕。

items.title_en: Ro Khanna is taking his economic message on the road. Will it lead to the White House?
items.title_zh: 罗·卡纳正在路上传递他的经济信息。它会通往白宫吗？
items.desc_en: Rep. Ro Khanna wasn't in the Rust Belt to campaign. But he could be soon.
items.desc_zh: 众议员罗·卡纳 (Ro Khanna) 并未前往铁锈地带竞选。但他可能很快就会做到。

items.title_en: Valve hikes Steam Deck prices by more than 40%, blaming rising costs
items.title_zh: Valve 将 Steam Deck 价格上调 40% 以上，原因是成本上涨
items.desc_en: The gaming giant said the handheld had not changed but the rise reflected "the current state of component costs"
items.desc_zh: 这家游戏巨头表示，掌上电脑没有改变，但上涨反映了“组件成本的现状”

items.title_en: US justice department launches criminal investigation into Trump accuser E Jean Carroll, reports say
items.title_zh: 报道称，美国司法部对特朗普指控者让·卡罗尔展开刑事调查
items.desc_en: The case centres on whether the former columnist lied about the funding she received for her civil lawsuit against the US president.
items.desc_zh: 该案的重点是这位前专栏作家是否对她针对美国总统的民事诉讼所获得的资金撒了谎。

items.title_en: US justice department launches criminal investigation into Trump accuser E Jean Carroll, reports say - BBC
items.title_zh: 据报道，美国司法部对特朗普原告 E Jean Carroll 展开刑事调查 - BBC

items.desc_zh: 据报道，美国司法部对特朗普原告 E·吉恩·卡罗尔 (E Jean Carroll) 展开刑事调查

items.title_zh: 国王学院团队获得尖端谷歌量子芯片的使用权
items.desc_en: King's College London researchers hope the chip will help answer previously unanswerable questions about the most important natural processes.
items.desc_zh: 伦敦国王学院的研究人员希望该芯片能够帮助回答有关最重要的自然过程的先前无法回答的问题。

items.title_en: Meta repeatedly snubs EU body over Facebook and Instagram user bans
items.title_zh: Meta 多次因 Facebook 和 Instagram 用户禁令而冷落欧盟机构
items.desc_en: The BBC has been contacted by hundreds of users who claimed they had been wrongly banned from the sites.
items.desc_zh: 数百名用户联系了 BBC，声称他们被错误地禁止访问这些网站。

items.title_en: Sixteen pupils killed in Kenya school fire, local police say
items.title_zh: 当地警方称，肯尼亚学校火灾造成 16 名学生死亡
items.desc_en: Search-and-rescue operations are ongoing, with the number of casualties yet to be confirmed.
items.desc_zh: 搜救行动仍在进行中，伤亡人数尚未确定。

items.desc_en: Several groups of women and children who spent years in a Syrian camp have returned in recent months.
items.desc_zh: 近几个月来，几批在叙利亚难民营度过数年的妇女和儿童已经返回。

items.title_en: Australia sues US giant 3M over 'forever chemicals' in firefighting foam
items.title_zh: 澳大利亚起诉美国巨头3M公司，称其消防泡沫中含有“永久化学物质”
items.desc_en: The A$2bn case, which centres on contamination at defence sites, is the largest ever brought by the government.
items.desc_zh: 这起耗资 20 亿澳元的案件主要涉及国防站点的污染问题，是政府有史以来提起的最大一起案件。

items.title_en: Google worker charged with using internal data to make $1.2m on bets
items.title_zh: 谷歌员工被控利用内部数据赚取 120 万美元赌注
items.desc_en: The longtime Google employee was charged in New York for allegedly breaking insider trading laws.
items.desc_zh: 这名谷歌长期员工因涉嫌违反内幕交易法而在纽约受到指控。

items.title_en: US carries out new strikes on Iran military site
items.title_zh: 美国对伊朗军事基地发动新一轮袭击
items.desc_en: The latest attack comes as President Trump has said that Iran is "negotiating on fumes".
items.desc_zh: 最近的袭击发生之际，特朗普总统表示伊朗正在“进行烟雾谈判”。

items.title_en: Middle East war live: At least 14 dead, including 3 children, in Israeli strikes on Lebanon - France 24

items.desc_en: Middle East war live: At least 14 dead, including 3 children, in Israeli strikes on Lebanon  France 24Lebanese Resigned to a Long War, Even if U.S. and Iran Make a Deal  The New York TimesNo End in Si
items.desc_zh: 中东战争实况：以色列对黎巴嫩的袭击造成至少 14 人死亡，其中包括 3 名儿童 法国 24 日，即使美国和伊朗达成协议，黎巴嫩人也接受了长期战争 纽约时报 以色列没有结束

items.title_en: Oil jumps after fresh U.S. strikes in Iran revive Strait of Hormuz disruption fears
items.title_zh: 美国对伊朗的新打击重燃霍尔木兹海峡中断的担忧，油价上涨
items.desc_en: Oil prices rose on Thursday after fresh U.S. strikes in Iran renewed concerns over disruptions to commercial shipping through the Strait of Hormuz.
items.desc_zh: 美国对伊朗的新一轮打击再次引发了人们对霍尔木兹海峡商业航运中断的担忧，周四油价上涨。

items.desc_en: The former US first lady told CBS News that she was frightened by Joe Biden's performance against Donald Trump.

items.desc_en: Tech minister Liz Kendall told the BBC the government would publish a response to the consultation in the summer.
items.desc_zh: 科技部长莉兹·肯德尔 (Liz Kendall) 告诉英国广播公司 (BBC)，政府将在夏季发布对此次咨询的回应。

items.desc_zh: Waymo 发言人表示，“出于高度谨慎”，该公司扩大了暂时暂停的范围。
